events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail** — missing ice barrier membrane at the eaves in a cold-climate installation violates IRC R905.1.2, which requires self-adhering ice barrier extending from the eave edge to at least 24" inside the exterior wall line. Flagged as `installed-defective`/`non-compliant`, high risk (ice-damming water intrusion), with corrective action to pull back roof covering and install the missing ice barrier before closeout.
